tasks.subject: Task 1: Repo-wide build configuration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lay down the centralized build/tooling configuration that every project in the repo will inherit (Directory.Build.props, Directory.Packages.props, global.json, .editorconfig, .gitattributes, .gitignore additions).

**Files:**
- Create: Directory.Build.props
- Create: Directory.Packages.props
- Create: global.json
- Create: .editorconfig
- Create: .gitattributes
- Modify: .gitignore (append editor folders)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All six files exist with the exact content shown in plan task 1.
- [ ] dotnet --version reports an SDK whose major.minor is 10.0.
- [ ] Existing .gitignore content preserved; new entries appended.

**Verify:** ls Directory.Build.props Directory.Packages.props global.json .editorconfig .gitattributes && dotnet --version

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Directory.Build.props", "Directory.Packages.props", "global.json", ".editorconfig", ".gitattributes", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "ls Directory.Build.props Directory.Packages.props global.json .editorconfig .gitattributes && dotnet --version", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All six files exist", "dotnet --version reports 10.0.x", "Existing .gitignore content preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Root documentation files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write the user-facing root docs (README.md, CHANGELOG.md, AI_DISCLOSURE.md). README must exist before main lib's dotnet pack runs.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md (replace existing minimal version)
- Create: CHANGELOG.md
- Create: AI_DISCLOSURE.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] README.md contains the full content from plan task 2.
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md exists with the Keep a Changelog template.
- [ ] AI_DISCLOSURE.md exists with the disclosure prose.

**Verify:** head -1 README.md CHANGELOG.md AI_DISCLOSURE.md

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "CHANGELOG.md", "AI_DISCLOSURE.md"], "verifyCommand": "head -1 README.md CHANGELOG.md AI_DISCLOSURE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README.md replaced with full content", "CHANGELOG.md created with Keep a Changelog template", "AI_DISCLOSURE.md created with disclosure prose"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Solution file and main library project
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the solution file, the src/ tier overrides, and the main library project with a placeholder file. Source generator is NOT wired yet.

**Files:**
- Create: JoakimAnder.Toolbox.sln
- Create: src/Directory.Build.props
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.csproj
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Placeholder.cs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Solution file references main lib project.
- [ ] dotnet build exits 0 with zero warnings.
- [ ] dotnet pack produces .nupkg and .snupkg.

**Verify:** dotnet build -c Release && dotnet pack src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.csproj -c Release -o ./artifacts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["JoakimAnder.Toolbox.sln", "src/Directory.Build.props", "src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.csproj", "src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Placeholder.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet pack src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.csproj -c Release -o ./artifacts && ls artifacts/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Solution file references main lib", "Main lib builds with zero warnings", "Pack produces .nupkg and .snupkg"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Source generator project
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the source generator project as a standalone netstandard2.0 Roslyn component.

**Files:**
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.csproj
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators/Placeholder.cs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Source generator project builds standalone.
- [ ] Target framework is netstandard2.0.
- [ ] Project added to solution.
- [ ] IsPackable=false.

**Verify:** dotnet build src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.csproj -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.csproj", "src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators/Placeholder.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.csproj -c Release", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Source gen project builds standalone", "Target framework is netstandard2.0", "Project added to solution", "No .nupkg produced"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire source generator into main library and pack
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Modify the main library csproj to reference the source generator as an analyzer AND repack the generator's DLL into the main NuGet at analyzers/dotnet/cs/.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.csproj

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Main lib csproj declares source gen as analyzer-only reference.
- [ ] Build chain works.
- [ ] .nupkg contains analyzers/dotnet/cs/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.dll.
- [ ] .nuspec does NOT list source gen as dependency.

**Verify:** dotnet pack && unzip -l artifacts/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.*.nupkg | grep analyzers/dotnet/cs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.csproj"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet pack src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.csproj -c Release -o ./artifacts && unzip -l artifacts/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.*.nupkg | grep 'analyzers/dotnet/cs/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.dll'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Main lib references source gen as analyzer-only", "Build chains correctly", ".nupkg contains analyzer DLL", ".nuspec does not list source gen as dependency"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Test projects with smoke tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the tests/ tier overrides and both test projects with one passing xUnit smoke test each.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/Directory.Build.props
- Create: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests.csproj
- Create: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/SmokeTests.cs
- Create: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.Tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.Tests.csproj
- Create: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.Tests/SmokeTests.cs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Both test projects in solution.
- [ ] dotnet test runs both projects.
- [ ] Both smoke tests pass.
- [ ] Test projects not packable.

**Verify:** dotnet test -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/Directory.Build.props", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests.csproj", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/SmokeTests.cs", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.Tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.Tests.csproj", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.Tests/SmokeTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test -c Release", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Both test projects in solution", "dotnet test runs both projects", "Both smoke tests pass", "Test projects are not packable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Examples project
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the examples/ tier overrides and a runnable console example project.

**Files:**
- Create: examples/Directory.Build.props
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.csproj
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples/Program.cs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Examples project in solution.
- [ ] dotnet run prints expected message.
- [ ] Examples project not packable.

**Verify:** dotnet run --project examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/Directory.Build.props", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.csproj", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples/Program.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet run --project examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples -c Release", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Examples project in solution", "dotnet run prints expected message", "Examples project is not packable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Final verification per completion criteria
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run the complete acceptance checklist from the spec and confirm Foundation is genuinely done. Also expand CHANGELOG.

**Files:**
- Modify: CHANGELOG.md (expand Unreleased Added section)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] restore/build/test/pack all exit 0 with zero warnings.
- [ ] .nupkg contains analyzer DLL + README + lib DLL.
- [ ] .nuspec contains MIT license + repo URL + readme reference.
- [ ] .snupkg contains .pdb.
- [ ] Working tree clean.
- [ ] CHANGELOG Unreleased section expanded.

**Verify:** Full sequence in plan doc Task 8 Steps 1-9.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet restore && dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test -c Release && dotnet pack src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.csproj -c Release -o ./artifacts && unzip -l artifacts/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.*.nupkg | grep 'analyzers/dotnet/cs/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.SourceGenerators.dll'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["restore/build/test/pack all exit 0", ".nupkg contains analyzer DLL + README + main lib DLL", ".nuspec contains MIT + repo URL + readme", ".snupkg contains .pdb", "working tree clean", "CHANGELOG expanded"]}
```
